original_image_tags: Hand-drawn sketch of an elongated, cylindrical or cigar-shaped object. The object tapers slightly from a wider front to a narrower rear.

elements.description: Hand-drawn sketch depicting an elongated, cylindrical object with a slightly curved profile. The top diagram shows a side view labeled with a length of '60 ft' and a height of '10 ft' at the wider end. The bottom diagram shows a cross-section or end view labeled 'Rear View' with a width of '10 ft'. The handwritten annotation 'INCL 2' is visible at the bottom left. The words 'RESTRICTED' are stamped at the top and bottom center.

judge.reason: Description B adds specific quoted labels ('60 ft', '10 ft', 'Rear View', 'INCL 2', 'RESTRICTED') and a 'slightly curved profile' that are not present in Description A, creating a contradiction on the presence and content of textual elements within the sketch.
